skills.label: Atomic structure and periodicity
skills.description: Practice and review: Atomic Structure and Properties. Topics include Moles and mass spectrometry; Electron configuration; Photoelectron spectroscopy cues.

skills.label: Bonding and molecular structure
skills.description: Practice and review: Molecular and Ionic Compound Structure and Properties. Topics include Bond types; Lewis structures and VSEPR; Lattice energy cues.

skills.label: IMFs, gases, and solutions
skills.description: Practice and review: Intermolecular Forces and Properties. Topics include IMFs and properties; Ideal gas and deviations; Solutions and spectroscopy.

skills.label: Reactions and stoichiometry
skills.description: Practice and review: Chemical Reactions. Topics include Net ionic equations; Stoichiometry; Titrations and redox intro.

skills.label: Kinetics
skills.description: Practice and review: Kinetics. Topics include Rate laws; Mechanisms and catalysts; Collision theory and energy profiles.

skills.label: Thermochemistry
skills.description: Practice and review: Thermodynamics. Topics include Enthalpy and calorimetry; Bond enthalpies; Heat transfer.

skills.label: Chemical equilibrium
skills.description: Practice and review: Equilibrium. Topics include K and Q; Le Châtelier; Solubility equilibrium.

skills.label: Acids and bases
skills.description: Practice and review: Acids and Bases. Topics include pH and Ka/Kb; Buffers and titrations; Acid–base molecular view.

skills.label: Thermo applications and electrochemistry
skills.description: Practice and review: Applications of Thermodynamics. Topics include Entropy and Gibbs free energy; Electrochemistry; Coupled processes.
